identity.name: Casa de Medina
identity.philosophy: We do not rent intelligence. We build it from mathematics.

classification.description: Not academic tech. Not corporate tech. Architectural Intelligence — building from the mathematical elements themselves.

strategies: SDK licensing — nova-os-sdk as an npm package with enterprise tiers
Token-as-a-Service — rent YOUR tokenizer to other AI companies
Engine API — expose the 23 engines as a paid API
Canister hosting — sovereign compute on your infrastructure
Research licensing — license the φ-mathematics to universities
White-label — let enterprises run Nova under their brand
